subject: Cunning fox and honest rabbit
keywords: story, kids, moral, animation, cunning, honesty, friendship, forest, animals, adventure, learning, values
moneyprinter_script: Once upon a time in a lush green forest, there lived a sly fox named Flicker and a kind-hearted rabbit called Rosie. One sunny morning, Flicker found a large basket of juicy carrots left by the riverbank. He thought about taking them but remembered his friend Rosie's wise words.

scenes.name: scene_01_beginning
scenes.title: The Magical Beginning
scenes.prompt: Vertical 9:16 children's storybook illustration of a sunny forest, Flicker the fox and Rosie the rabbit playing together in a meadow, no text, no watermark

scenes.name: scene_02_problem_rising_action
scenes.title: Flicker Finds the Basket
scenes.prompt: Vertical 9:16 children's storybook illustration of Flicker the fox discovering a large basket of carrots by the riverbank, no text, no watermark
bullets: Key point: Flicker Finds the Basket

scenes.name: scene_03_choice_turning_point
scenes.title: Flicker’s Dilemma
scenes.prompt: Vertical 9:16 children's storybook illustration of Flicker the fox contemplating between taking the carrots or leaving them, Rosie the rabbit watching from a distance, no text, no watermark

scenes.name: scene_04_resolution
scenes.title: Flicker’s Choice
scenes.prompt: Vertical 9:16 children's storybook illustration of Flicker the fox returning the carrots to Rosie and the riverbank, both animals smiling and sharing a carrot, no text, no watermark

scenes.name: scene_05_happy_ending
scenes.title: A Friendship Built on Trust
scenes.prompt: Vertical 9:16 children's storybook illustration of Flicker the fox and Rosie the rabbit happily sharing a meal in their cozy burrow, no text, no watermark
bullets: Key point: A Friendship Built on Trust

scenes.name: scene_06_moral_summary
scenes.title: The Value of Honesty
